title: Assertion failure while copying dynamic array
body:
The following code:

```
module test;

reg[7:0] mema[];
reg[7:0] memb[];

initial begin
  mema = new[4];
  memb = new[4] (mema);
end

endmodule
```

Results in the following error when compiling with "-g2012".

```
test.sv:8: internal_error: net type doesn't match context type.
test.sv:8:               : net type=dynamic array of logic unsigned[7:0]
test.sv:8:               : context type=logic unsigned[7:0]
test.sv:8: assert: elab_expr.cc:3475: failed assertion ntype->type_compatible(net->net_type())
```
code_blocks:
test.sv:8: internal_error: net type doesn't match context type.
test.sv:8:               : net type=dynamic array of logic unsigned[7:0]
test.sv:8:               : context type=logic unsigned[7:0]
test.sv:8: assert: elab_expr.cc:3475: failed assertion ntype->type_compatible(net->net_type())
